puzzleDescription: Learn how to use the logical OR (||) operator to check if a character is a vowel (a, e, i, o, u).
objective: Input a character and print 'Vowel' if it's a vowel, otherwise print 'Consonant'.
hints: Use '||' to check multiple conditions: if (ch == 'a' || ch == 'e' || ...)
Remember that characters use single quotes (e.g., 'a'), not double quotes.
Print 'Vowel' if any of the conditions are true, otherwise use 'else' for 'Consonant'.
